title: Post-Award — Forms Index
content:
The Post-Award Forms page lists the eight DocuSign forms required for grant-funded requests processed through the Morgan State University Office of Research Administration (ORA). All submissions route through DocuSign to the MSU ORA signing group; questions and submissions go to ora-docusign@morgan.edu.

Forms available (each has its own form card in the KB):

1. Honoraria Request Memo — payment for participation to a person not employed by or a student of Morgan State University. One-time payments with market-rate limitations. International payments require Accounts Payable guidance.

2. PF-10 Contractual Personnel Request Form — exclusively for revisions and continuation requests for existing contractual personnel. New employees must use the EPAF system via WebSIS.

3. Stipend Request Memo — requires the requested check issue date to be a minimum of 45 days after submission of the request.

4. Non-Title III Travel Request Form — for grant travel funded by non-Title III sources. As of 05/30/2024, 'Grant/Award End Date' is a mandatory field. Additional details at the University Travel website.

5. Title III Travel Request Form — for grant travel funded by Title III sources.

6. Travel Reimbursement Form (GAD Form X-5) — uses the State of Maryland Expense Account (GAD Form X-5) format.

7. Grant-Funded Undergraduate Tuition, Fees, and Health Insurance Request Memo — for undergraduate tuition, fees, and health insurance support paid from grant funds.

8. Grant-Funded Graduate Tuition and Fees Request Memo — graduate version; graduate student health insurance must be reimbursed via a separate requisition, not on this memo.

General guidance and references: PI Handbook 3: Grant-Related Processes (2025-02-24 PDF) documents the broader post-award business processes these forms support.

Additional details (verified via Playwright on 2026-05-14): The live page now lists the primary DocuSign forms contact as Rebecca Steiner (rebecca.steiner@morgan.edu, 443-885-4044) — the older ora-docusign@morgan.edu inbox may still be monitored but is not displayed on the current page. The two travel request forms (Title III and Non-Title III) are grouped on the live page under the heading 'Travel Request Form (COMP 01)', which is the State of Maryland COMP-01 form designation. For PF-10 guidance on first-time and repeat employees (who use EPAF via WebSIS instead), an ORA e-training module on Contractual Salaries is available at https://www.morgan.edu/office-of-research-administration/trainings/e-training. Travel form completion guidance and TL-number processing tips are at https://www.morgan.edu/comptroller/university-travel (questions to the Office of the Comptroller's Travel Division). A completed sample of the Undergraduate Tuition memo is published at https://www.morgan.edu/Documents/ADMINISTRATION/OFFICES/ora/ORAForms/Post-Award%20Forms/Samples/Sample_UndergradTuition.pdf (KB doc_id: form_sample_undergrad_tuition_memo).

Contacts: ask.ora@morgan.edu, rebecca.steiner@morgan.edu, ora-docusign@morgan.edu. Phone 443-885-4044. Tyler Hall Suite 304, Baltimore, MD 21251.

key_facts.non_title_iii_travel_form_update: Grant/Award End Date became mandatory on 2024-05-30
